description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-234 (Settings Pages Wiring). Two files are modified: apps/web/src/app/settings/team/page.tsx and apps/web/src/app/settings/integrations/page.tsx. Two new test files are created: apps/web/src/app/settings/team/__tests__/page.test.tsx and apps/web/src/app/settings/integrations/__tests__/page.test.tsx. The baseline captures coverage state before wiring. No test files exist for these pages yet (hardcoded arrays, no tRPC hooks).
command: Baseline: no prior test coverage exists for settings/team/page.tsx or settings/integrations/page.tsx. After capture: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test --run --coverage targeting src/app/settings/team/page.tsx and src/app/settings/integrations/page.tsx.

apps/web/src/app/settings/team/page.tsx.note: No tests exist pre-implementation. File has hardcoded data; no test file in src/**.

apps/web/src/app/settings/integrations/p.note: No tests exist pre-implementation. File has hardcoded data; no test file in src/**.

baseline_totals.note: Zero coverage for in-scope files pre-implementation. New test files will drive coverage to >=80%.
